results.title: Hickory city manager to present proposed budget at tonight's city council meeting
results.description: Hickory City Manager Warren Wood's recommended budget calls for keeping the property tax rate at 46 cents per $100 of assessed value.

results.title: Israel, Hezbollah exchange fire after Trump announcement
results.description: BEIRUT (LEBANON) - Israel conducted strikes on south Lebanon and Hezbollah fired into northern Israel on Tuesday, after US President Donald Trump announced an agreement to halt attacks that neither side has publicly accepted.

results.title: CJ Sharma orders courts to clear old cases, crack down on irregularities
results.description: Kathmandu, June 2: Chief Justice Manoj Sharma has directed courts across the country to curb irregularities within the judiciary and ensure that no cases older than two years remain pending by the end of the current fiscal year. Issuing a written circular to the chief judges of high courts and district court judges, Sharma instructed [...] The post CJ Sharma orders courts to clear old cases, crack down on irregularities appeared first on Peoples' Review .
